scoring._summary: Analyzed 40 scored results across 2 scenario(s) and 4 condition(s). Top condition: full-twining (mean=88.1).

conditions._summary: 0/6 condition pairs significantly different after Holm-Bonferroni correction; 0/3 pairs vs 'baseline' are significant.

coordination.summary: Analyzed 140 sessions across 4 conditions. Overall engagement rate: 50% (70/140 sessions used Twining). Non-engagement flagged for: baseline, shared-markdown.

power_analysis.verdict: effect (d=0.24) is below detectable threshold (MDES=1.32) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect
effect (d=0.62) is below detectable threshold (MDES=1.32) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect

at_5_iterations.note: Going from 3→5 iterations costs ~66% more but detects medium effects (d≈0.6) at 80% power

harness_summary.headline: full-twining ranks #1 with 88.1 composite (+25.7 vs baseline, large effect, p<0.05)

items.message: Coordination hurts in 'conflict-resolution': shared-markdown scores -12.0 points below baseline

High scorer variance (CV>20%) in 16 scenario x condition pairs for dimensions: backwardCompatibility, conflict-detection, decision-documentation, decisionEvolution, integrationCompleteness, requirementAdaptation, resolution-quality
Inconclusive comparisons (shared-markdown, twining-lite): observed effects are below detectable threshold — cannot distinguish from noise at current sample size
Escalating cost in 'conflict-resolution' x 'full-twining': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.127)
Escalating cost in 'conflict-resolution' x 'twining-lite': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.226)
Escalating cost in 'evolving-requirements' x 'baseline': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.214)
Escalating cost in 'evolving-requirements' x 'full-twining': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.167)
